color: rgb(26, 26, 26) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
The choice Leo XIV names at ¶ 9:
Babel or Jerusalem?

div.style: color: rgb(245, 240, 232) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
color: rgb(245, 240, 232) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Labor given by many;
no continuing claim

div.style: color: rgb(245, 240, 232) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(245, 240, 232) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Returns flow upward
to the tower's directors

div.style: color: rgb(245, 240, 232) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Dispersion falls
on the laboring nodes

div.style: color: rgb(245, 240, 232) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Capital allocated section
by section, each to its
own builder

div.style: color: rgb(245, 240, 232) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
color: rgb(245, 240, 232) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Materials remain with
the builder who placed them

div.style: color: rgb(245, 240, 232) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Return shared: the city
stands because every
section stands

div.style: color: rgb(245, 240, 232) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
color: rgb(245, 240, 232) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Doctrinal read: mutuum
dressed in monumental
architecture

div.style: color: rgb(245, 240, 232) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Doctrinal read: societas
in built form — the
lawyer must draft it
